Declares a function to get a compositor transition timeline.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `compositor_peek_transition_timeline_get` that returns a pointer to a `CompositorTransition` object. The function is likely used to access or inspect a transition timeline within a compositor service, which is part of a broader system for managing graphical transitions. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
